metadata.title: 안전 제약 시스템 및 충돌 회피

story.iWant: 충돌 회피 제약을 형식화하고 실행 전 검증

task.title: Pioneer 3-DX 로봇 설정 및 이동 정확도 개선 (선행 작업)
task.note: Task 0 부분 완료: Pioneer3DXConfig 생성, ActorAgent 수정, 79/79 테스트 통과. Webots 실제 테스트 대기 중.

task.title: 안전 제약 정의 및 설정 클래스 구현

subtasks.subtask: SafetyConstraints Pydantic 클래스 생성 (min_obstacle_distance=0.5m, max_speed=1.0m/s, safe_zone_bounds, emergency_stop_distance=0.2m)

task.title: Actor Agent 안전 검증 로직 통합

subtasks.subtask: Actor 초기화 시 SafetyValidator 인스턴스 생성
검증 실패 시 action 실행 건너뛰기

task.title: 안전 위반 처리 및 경고 시스템

subtasks.subtask: Actor Agent 안전 위반 처리 로직
유닛 테스트: test_safety_validator.py (obstacle, speed, bounds, emergency stop)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: 안전 제약 정의: 최소 장애물 거리 0.5m, 최대 속도 1m/s, 안전 영역 내 작동 규칙 정의
Pydantic Schema 활용: RobotAction의 safety_check 필드를 사용하여 안전 검증 플래그 관리
Actor 실행 전 안전 검증: Actor Agent가 행동 실행 전 안전 제약 검증 로직 구현
안전 위반 처리: 안전 위반 시 즉시 중단 및 명확한 경고 메시지 출력
테스트 케이스: 장애물 0.3m 거리에서 이동 명령 시 거부되는지 검증

doc.title: System Architecture
doc.snippet: RobotAction schema includes safety_check: bool field. Safety constraints: Position limits (-5m to 5m), speed limits (0.1 to 2.0 m/s), duration limits (0.1 to 10.0 seconds). Sensor Integration: Use Lidar data for obstacle detection, GPS for boundary checks.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: 안전 제약 시스템 및 충돌 회피. Prerequisites: Story 1.5 (Actor Agent), Story 2.2 (Sensors). Actor실행 전 안전 검증, 최소 장애물 거리 0.5m, 최대 속도 1m/s 제약.

doc.title: Story 2.2 Code Review
doc.snippet: SensorManager.is_path_clear_ahead(min_distance, angle_range) already checks obstacles. SensorManagerConfig uses Pydantic Field validation pattern. Custom exception pattern established in src/sensors/exceptions.py with 4 exception classes.

doc.title: Current Story - Safety Constraints
doc.snippet: Pioneer 3-DX 로봇 설정 클래스 생성 완료 (src/config/robot_config.py). ActorAgent의 _execute_move() 및 _execute_rotate() 메서드 수정 완료. 79/79 유닛 테스트 통과. Webots 시뮬레이션 실제 테스트 대기 중.

artifact.reason: Primary file to modify. Need to add SafetyValidator integration before executing actions. Already modified in Task 0 for accurate movement (lines 281-288, 360-374).
Already has safety_check: bool field. Verify field is properly used for safety validation flag management.
Reuse is_path_clear_ahead(min_distance, angle_range) for obstacle detection. Reuse get_obstacles_in_range(max_distance) for detailed analysis. Already implemented in Story 2.2.
Follow Pydantic configuration pattern established here. Use same Field validation approach for SafetyConstraints class.
Extend with SafetyViolationException following existing pattern. 4 exception classes already defined: SensorInitializationError, DeviceNotFoundError, SensorDataError, FilterConfigurationError.
Created in Task 0. Pioneer 3-DX specifications (wheel_radius=0.0975m, wheel_distance=0.33m). Accurate kinematics for safe movement.

constraints.constraint: Follow Pydantic configuration pattern from SensorManagerConfig (src/sensors/config.py)
Follow custom exception pattern from src/sensors/exceptions.py (4 existing exception classes)
Maintain 79/79 test passing rate - do not break existing tests
Create new directory: src/safety/ for safety-related modules
Task 0 partially complete - builds on Pioneer3DXConfig for accurate movement

interface.name: SafetyConstraints
interface.signature: class SafetyConstraints(BaseModel): min_obstacle_distance: float = 0.5; max_speed: float = 1.0; safe_zone_bounds: Tuple[float, float, float, float]; emergency_stop_distance: float = 0.2
interface.description: Pydantic model defining safety constraint parameters. Follow SensorManagerConfig pattern with Field validation.

interface.name: SafetyValidator
interface.signature: class SafetyValidator: __init__(sensor_manager: SensorManager, constraints: SafetyConstraints); validate_action(action: RobotAction) -> Tuple[bool, str]
interface.description: Core safety validation class. Checks obstacle distance, speed limits, position bounds before action execution. Returns (is_safe, message).

interface.name: SafetyValidator.validate_action
interface.signature: def validate_action(self, action: RobotAction) -> Tuple[bool, str]
interface.description: Validates action against safety constraints. Checks: 1) Obstacle distance via SensorManager.get_obstacles_in_range(), 2) Speed limits via action.speed validation, 3) Position bounds via action.x, action.y validation. Returns (True, "Safe") or (False, "Reason for rejection").

interface.name: SafetyViolationException
interface.signature: class SafetyViolationException(Exception): violation_type: str; message: str
interface.description: Exception raised when safety constraint is violated. violation_type: "obstacle_too_close", "speed_too_high", "out_of_bounds", "emergency_stop". Follow pattern of existing 4 exception classes.

interface.name: ActorAgent.execute_action (modified)
interface.description: Modified to call SafetyValidator.validate_action() before executing. If validation fails, log warning and return False without executing action. If action.safety_check=False, bypass validation (emergency use).

tests.standards: Use pytest framework. Follow patterns from Story 2.2 (28/28 tests passing). Mock Webots sensor data for reproducibility. Use Pydantic validation for schema tests. Maintain 100% test pass rate. Current baseline: 79/79 tests passing after Task 0.

ideas.idea: Test SafetyConstraints Pydantic validation (min_obstacle_distance, max_speed, safe_zone_bounds)
Test SafetyValidator.validate_action() with mock obstacle at 0.3m (should reject)
Test SafetyValidator.validate_action() with mock obstacle at 1.0m (should approve)
Test SafetyValidator.validate_action() with speed 1.5 m/s (should reject, max 1.0 m/s)
Test SafetyValidator.validate_action() with out-of-bounds position (should reject)
Test SafetyValidator.validate_action() with emergency stop distance 0.2m (should trigger emergency)
Test Actor executes action when validation passes
Test Actor skips action when validation fails (logs warning, returns False)
Test Actor bypasses validation when action.safety_check=False
Integration test: Actor + SafetyValidator + SensorManager with mock Webots data
E2E test: Place obstacle at 0.3m → Actor attempts move → Validation rejects → Action not executed
